utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items with corresponding entries. Each item is described with coverage details (what is included) and the total_budget is specified with a numeric monthly cost (€485.0/month). Thus, all items are present and fully specified according to the requested format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists a single package name—'Proposed Comprehensive Portfolio27'—applied to all categories (health, property, travel, and additional services). This package includes comprehensive physical/mental health coverage, property protection for luxury and sports items, travel coverage with adventure sports protection, and concierge/priority services. To map it to the ground-truth ratings, I matched each included coverage area to the closest rated plans and services with equivalent scope. The portfolio appears to combine top-rated comprehensive plans for health, property, and travel, resembling LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical and mental health rating 9), LifeFirst Standard Coverage (property rating 9), and InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel rating 10). For additional services like concierge and priority claims, the closest match is Premium Insurance Membership (rating 6). Therefore, each coverage component in the final plan maps to these ratings accordingly.

final_package_text:
{
    "health_coverage": "Proposed Comprehensive Portfolio27 (includes physical and mental health coverage, immediate specialist access, 24/7 emergency support, wellness programs, telemedicine, stress management, crisis intervention, gym reimbursement, family therapy, psychiatry services)",
    "property_coverage": "Proposed Comprehensive Portfolio27 (includes robust coverage for high-value sports equipment, luxury items, jewelry, art, electronics, golf equipment, recreation accident coverage)",
    "travel_coverage": "Proposed Comprehensive Portfolio27 (includes medical evacuation, adventure sports coverage, emergency medical coverage of at least €35,000-45,000, rescue/evacuation coverage of at least €10,000-20,000 for high-risk regions, business travel protection, emergency coordination)",
    "additional_services": "Proposed Comprehensive Portfolio27 (includes concierge services, dedicated agent, priority claims, 24/7 customer support, global assistance, emergency coordination, condition management programs, specialized rescue services)",
    "total_budget": "€485.0/month"
}
